Prompt: Neon sign at night: a blue-and-pink neon sign that clearly reads “Spring Plan 2026”, clean letter strokes (no broken characters), rainy street reflections in the background.
Prompt_zh: 夜晚的霓虹灯：一个粉蓝相间的霓虹灯招牌，清晰地写着“Spring Plan 2026”，笔画干净（无断字），背景有雨天街道的倒影。

Prompt: Minimal poster design: white background, centered title text “AI Visual Benchmark”, smaller subtitle “Benchmark v1.0” below it, perfectly centered alignment, generous whitespace, print-like sharpness.
Prompt_zh: 极简海报设计：白色背景，居中标题文字“AI Visual Benchmark”，下方是较小的副标题“Benchmark v1.0”，完美居中对齐，大量留白，具有印刷般的清晰度。

Prompt: Tea packaging mockup: a premium tea box with the main title “Mountain Oolong” and subtitle “Light Aroma”, modern serif typography, realistic print texture, clean layout margins.
Prompt_zh: 茶叶包装样机：一个高级茶叶盒，主标题为“Mountain Oolong”，副标题为“Light Aroma”，现代衬线体字体，真实的印刷质感，布局边距整洁。

Prompt: Generate a supermarket shelf price label strip where the center label clearly reads “Oat Milk 1L $3.49” with clean kerning and no warped letters.
Prompt_zh: 生成超市货架价格标签条，中间的标签清晰地写着“Oat Milk 1L $3.49”，字间距整齐，字母无变形。

Prompt: Make a coffee shop menu board that clearly reads “LATTE 4.50 AMERICANO 3.50 MOCHA 5.00” with consistent baseline alignment and even spacing.
Prompt_zh: 制作咖啡店菜单板，清晰地写着“LATTE 4.50 AMERICANO 3.50 MOCHA 5.00”，基线对齐一致，间距均匀。

Prompt: Create a street name sign mounted on a pole that reads “PINE STREET” in all caps, perfectly legible and correctly foreshortened.
Prompt_zh: 创建一个安装在电线杆上的街道名称牌，大写字母写着“PINE STREET”，完全清晰可辨，且透视缩短效果正确。

Prompt: Create a neon storefront sign at night that clearly reads “OPEN 24 HOURS” with continuous strokes and realistic glow without broken letters.
Prompt_zh: 创建一个夜晚的霓虹灯店面招牌，清晰地写着“OPEN 24 HOURS”，笔画连续，光泽真实，字母完整。

Prompt: Make a bookstore window poster that reads “WINTER SALE UP TO 50% OFF” with centered layout and clean margins.
Prompt_zh: 制作书店橱窗海报，写着“WINTER SALE UP TO 50% OFF”，采用居中布局和整洁的边距。

Prompt: Generate a handwritten grocery list on a notepad that reads “eggs, rice, apples, soap, tea” with consistent stroke thickness and no garbled words.
Prompt_zh: 在记事本上生成一份手写的购物清单，写着“eggs, rice, apples, soap, tea”，笔画粗细一致，文字清晰无乱码。

Prompt: Generate a cardboard box stamp that reads “HANDLE WITH CARE” in bold stencil letters, evenly spaced and not smudged.
Prompt_zh: 生成纸箱印章，用粗体模板字体写着“HANDLE WITH CARE”，间距均匀且无污迹。
final_ranking: {Z_Image, Banana, Flux, GPT, Banana_pro, Qwen_Image, SD3} > {SDXL}

Prompt_zh: 夜晚多雨的赛博朋克街道，闪烁的霓虹灯，一个巨大的招牌清晰地显示着汉字“未来城市”，电影级灯光，极高细节。

Prompt_zh: 床头柜上的极简蜡烛罐，标签上清晰地用简洁的现代字体写着“Lavender Fields”，温暖闪烁的烛光。

Prompt: A large traditional Chinese red lantern hanging from a roof, painted with the characters “万事如意” in gold, glowing against a night sky.
Prompt_zh: 屋檐下悬挂的大型中国传统红灯笼，上面用金漆写着汉字“万事如意”，在夜色中发光。

Prompt: A gym wall mural with bold black letters clearly reading “NO EXCUSES”, industrial gym equipment and dramatic lighting in the background.
Prompt_zh: 健身房墙壁上的壁画，粗体黑色字母清晰显示“NO EXCUSES”，背景是工业风格的健身器械和戏剧性灯光。

Prompt: A rustic chalkboard menu at a farmer's market, with neat chalk handwriting clearly reading “Daily Specials”, baskets of fresh vegetables around it.
Prompt_zh: 农贸市场上的质朴黑板菜单，整齐的粉笔字清晰写着“Daily Specials”，周围放着几篮新鲜蔬菜。

Prompt: A vintage postcard lying on a desk, with the cursive text “Greetings from Paris” clearly visible, stamps and travel accessories nearby.
Prompt_zh: 桌上放着的一张复古明信片，清晰可见手写体文字“Greetings from Paris”，旁边有邮票和旅行配件。

Prompt: A laptop lid covered in colorful stickers, one central sticker clearly showing the phrase “I Love Code” in a pixelated computer font.
Prompt_zh: 贴满彩色贴纸的笔记本电脑盖，中心的一张贴纸清晰显示像素化电脑字体的短语“I Love Code”。

Prompt: A luxury tea brand mockup featuring a white tin container with the Chinese characters “云间草木” in gold, clean minimalist aesthetic.
Prompt_zh: 高端茶叶品牌样机，白色马口铁罐上带有金色的汉字“云间草木”，极简纯净美学。

Prompt: A hotel room keycard lying on a white bedsheet, clearly printed with the name “CENTRAL HOTEL” and “ROOM 305”, clean typography.
Prompt_zh: 铺在白色床单上的酒店房卡，清晰印有名称“CENTRAL HOTEL”和“ROOM 305”，排版整洁。

Prompt: A street graffiti piece on a gray wall, bold stylized letters clearly reading “REBEL”, vibrant spray paint drips and textures.
Prompt_zh: 灰色墙上的街道涂鸦作品，粗体艺术化字母清晰显示“REBEL”，鲜艳的喷漆滴落感和纹理。

Prompt: A realistic store receipt resting on a counter, with the text “Total: $12.50” clearly legible at the bottom, soft shop lighting.
Prompt_zh: 柜台上真实的商店收据，底部清晰可辨文字“Total: $12.50”，柔和的商店灯光。

Prompt: A neon sign in a rainy alleyway at night, the Chinese characters “不夜城” glowing in electric green, reflections on wet pavement.
Prompt_zh: 夜晚多雨巷弄里的霓虹灯，汉字“不夜城”发出荧光绿的光，湿润路面上有倒影。

Prompt: A digital bus destination sign on the front of a bus, clearly displaying “CITY CENTER” in bright amber dot-matrix characters.
Prompt_zh: 公交车前部的电子目的地显示屏，清晰地用亮琥珀色点阵字符显示“CITY CENTER”。
final_ranking: {Banana_pro, Z_Image, Qwen_Image, Flux, Banana, GPT, SD3} > {SDXL}

Prompt: A paper bakery bag standing on a table, with a simple logo that clearly reading “WHOLE WHEAT” in a rustic stamp style.
Prompt_zh: 桌上的面包纸袋，带有一个简单的 Logo，清晰显示质朴印章风格的“WHOLE WHEAT”字样。

Prompt: A sleek modern UI button on a screen, with bold white letters clearly reading “START ENGINE”, cool glowing tech atmosphere.
Prompt_zh: 屏幕上时尚的现代 UI 按钮，清晰显示粗体白色字母“START ENGINE”，冷色调科技感氛围。

Prompt: A cyberpunk computer terminal in a dark room, displaying the message “ACCESS GRANTED” in bright green monospace text.
Prompt_zh: 暗室里的赛博朋克电脑终端，以亮绿色等宽文字显示信息“ACCESS GRANTED”。

Prompt: A close-up of a red traditional Chinese seal stamp on white paper, clearly showing the characters “心迹” in an ancient style.
Prompt_zh: 白纸上红色中国传统印章的特写，清晰显示古风样式的汉字“心迹”。

Prompt: A vinyl record label spinning on a turntable, the text clearly reading “Side A: Retro Vibes” in a clean circular layout.
Prompt_zh: 转盘上旋转的黑胶唱片标签，文字清晰地以简洁的圆形布局写着“Side A: Retro Vibes”。

Prompt: A museum description plaque on a gallery wall, with sharp black text clearly reading “Oil on Canvas, 1895”, warm gallery spotlights.
Prompt_zh: 画廊墙上的博物馆描述牌，清晰的黑色文字写着“Oil on Canvas, 1895”，暖色画廊聚光灯。

Prompt: A white wedding invitation card with elegant gold foil lettering clearly reading “Save the Date”, surrounded by soft flowers.
Prompt_zh: 白色的婚礼邀请卡，优雅的金箔刻字清晰写着“Save the Date”，周围环绕着柔和的花朵。
final_ranking: {SD3, Banana, GPT, Banana_pro} > {Qwen_Image, Z_Image, Flux, SDXL}

Prompt: A traditional Chinese calligraphy piece on a wooden table, ink brush characters clearly showing “宁静致远”, scholarly tools nearby.
Prompt_zh: 木桌上的中国传统书法作品，水墨笔触清晰显示“宁静致远”，旁边放着文房四宝。

Prompt: A roll of packing tape on a cardboard box with the word “FRAGILE” printed repeatedly in bold red letters, realistic texture.
Prompt_zh: 纸箱上的包装胶带，重复印有粗体红色字母“FRAGILE”，质感真实。

Prompt: A retro arcade screen displaying the high score board, with the top text clearly reading “TOP PLAYER: ACE”, pixel art style.
Prompt_zh: 显示最高分榜单的复古游戏机屏幕，顶部文字清晰显示“TOP PLAYER: ACE”，像素艺术风格。

Prompt: A boutique shop sign in an old street, featuring artistic Chinese characters clearly reading “古风遗韵”, warm sunset lighting.
Prompt_zh: 老街上的精品店招牌，艺术化的汉字清晰显示“古风遗韵”，温暖的夕阳光照。
